diagrams.title: Three-Way Handshake Process
diagrams.description: Shows the TCP connection establishment process between client and server using SYN, SYN-ACK, and ACK packets
diagrams.purpose: Understand how TCP establishes reliable connections before data transfer

diagrams.title: Four-Way Handshake Termination
diagrams.description: Shows the TCP connection termination process using FIN and ACK packets
diagrams.purpose: Understand graceful connection termination in TCP

diagrams.title: UDP vs TCP Header Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of header sizes and fields in UDP and TCP
elements: UDP: 8 bytes (Source Port, Dest Port, Length, Checksum)
TCP: 20-60 bytes (Source Port, Dest Port, Seq Num, Ack Num, Flags, Window, Checksum, Options)
diagrams.purpose: Understand overhead differences between connectionless and connection-oriented protocols

diagrams.title: Connectionless Datagram Routing
diagrams.description: Shows how independent datagrams take different paths in a network
elements: Packets may arrive out of order
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how connectionless packets are routed independently

visuals.title: Connectionless And Connection Oriented
visuals.description: Visual diagram for connectionless and connection oriented
